sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60594" key="kukhqmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠκ-ηθμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n60594.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">confusion, disturbance</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:16:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.9</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:17:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
